race.comment: WESTERN WARRIOR (2) big jump in class at start six with a plugging eighth over 1400m at Dubbo in the WRA Champs last Sunday. Set top bounce back in this grade. KILTIKI (16) gave us a glimpse of what he's capable of when closed late for a good third over 1200m at Dubbo. Stalks the speed from the good gate and capable of repeating the effort. BLACK NATURE (10) big jump in class when she drifted back before running on late when sixth over 1400m at Dubbo in the WRA Champs last Sunday. Look for her late from the wide barrier. GOLDEN WARRIOR (4) can shine fourth-up with the 3kg claim. Capable of better.
